resources.string: Forwards touch events from the SBS stereo overlay to the projected app at the correct screen coordinates.

1. Start the app you want to project to the SBS overlay

 2. Start SBS Projector.
 If you see [Accessibility permission required — tap to enable], tap it:
 - find SBS Projector in the Accessibility list and enable it, then return here.
 This is required for the overlay to work and only needs to be done once.

 3. Tap [Start SBS]
 - allow to send notifications when prompted
 - grant *display over other apps* permission when prompted

 4. On the *Share your screen with SBS projector?* dialog choose *Share one app* and proceed

 5. Select the projectable app you already started

 6. Put your phone in the VR headset


To stop the projection: tap the blue [STOP SBS] button at the top of the overlay.
